Off Calendar Oct-16-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long, CSR#8620 (212)
